pi_items.metadata_value: Thank you for reaching out. We have received your warranty claim and our support team will review it within 48 business hours. Please retain this email for your records.
pi_items.verified_value: Thank you for reaching out. We have received your warranty claim and our support team will review it within 48 business hours. Please retain this email for your records.

pi_items.source: task description instructions and verifier.py logic for Thunderbird msgFilterRules.dat format
task description instructions and verifier.py logic for Thunderbird msgFilterRules.dat format

privileged_info_summary: The test environment injects synthetic customer emails directly into Thunderbird's local inbox via a bash script. The expected template subject ('Warranty Claim Received - Status Update'), template body, filter name ('Warranty Auto-Reply'), condition ('subject,contains,Warranty Claim'), and action ('reply') exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the task description. The verifier validates these values through direct string matching against Thunderbird's exported Templates and msgFilterRules.dat files.
